title: Model
description: An Amazon Lookout for Equipment ML model for anomaly detection.

ModelArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the model.

DatasetName.description: The name of the dataset used to train the model.

Status.description: The current status of the model.

TrainingDataStartTime.description: Indicates the time reference in the dataset from which training data begins.

TrainingDataEndTime.description: Indicates the time reference in the dataset from which training data ends.

CreatedAt.description: The time at which the model was created.
